resources.string: runway
Connect to runway
Enter the address of the runway server you use. After the check, the complete app opens in a secure browser tab so the server remains visible.
Server address
https://runway.example.com
Use the full public HTTPS address. No account details are sent during this check.
Current server: %1$s
Checking this server…
Enter an HTTPS address without a path, query, or sign-in details.
Enter an HTTPS address, or a private HTTP address for this debug build, without a path or sign-in details.
This address did not identify itself as a compatible runway server.
This runway server and Android app do not support the same mobile API version. Update the older one, then try again.
The server could not be reached securely. Check the address, certificate, and network, then try again.
Change runway server?

This disconnects this phone from the current server, then removes its saved account connection, Gadgetbridge folder access, queued checks, and local import markers. It does not delete GPX files or data already stored on either server.
Disconnecting this phone from the current server…
Switching servers…
The server connection changed in another window. Review the current server and try again.
The current server could not be reached, so this phone is still connected there.
Current server unavailable

Switching anyway removes local access, but the old server may keep this device active until you disconnect it there. An upload already in progress may finish. Cancel if you can bring the old server back online first.
Switch anyway
Connect to server
Change server
Cancel
OK
runway server
Server
Change runway server
No browser available
Install or enable a browser to open runway.
Automatic GPX imports
Gadgetbridge folder
Connect this phone once, then choose the folder where Gadgetbridge saves your runs.
Folder
Device folder
Choose folder
Change folder
Choose folder again
Disconnect folder
Check now
Enable background checks
Disable background checks
Account connection
In runway, open Import and create a code for this phone.
Pairing code
Device name
Android phone
Connect account
Connecting…
Account connected for background imports.
This account connection expired or was disconnected in runway. Create a new pairing code to reconnect.
The account connection is saved, but runway could not be reached to check it.
That pairing code is invalid or expired.
The account could not be connected. Check the network and try again.
Android could not protect the connection on this device. Disconnect the device in runway before trying again.
Forget account on this device
Disconnecting this phone from the account…
Account connection removed from this device and runway.
runway could not be reached, so this phone is still connected there.
runway unavailable
Forgetting anyway removes the local credential, but the server may keep this phone active until you disconnect it from runway. Cancel if you can bring the server back online first.
Forget anyway
Connect this phone to continue.
Account connected. Choose a folder next.
Folder access needs to be restored.
Ready to import new GPX files.
New files go to the runway activity inbox. You review them before they affect your plan.
Folder connected. Android read access is persisted.
Folder connected. Background checks are enabled.
Folder connected. Connect the account above before enabling background checks.
The saved folder needs permission again.
No folder connected.
Android did not grant persistent read access to that folder.
Folder access removed.
Folder check queued.
Automatic checks
Connect the account and folder to turn on background checks.
Background checks enabled. Android schedules them inexactly.
Background checks disabled.
No folder check has run yet.
Checking the folder now…
Folder check queued.
Last check added a GPX to the inbox.
Last check skipped GPX content already seen.
Last check held a GPX for manual review.
Last check found nothing new.
Checks stopped because the account connection is missing.
Checks stopped because folder access is missing.
The last check could not read this folder. Try Check now.
This folder has more than 10,000 files. Choose a dedicated Gadgetbridge folder.
Waiting for the newest GPX to stop changing.
The last check could not finish. Android will retry.
An old check stopped because the account or folder changed.
Checks stopped because no runway server is connected.
The folder check finished.
%1$s This folder is over the 10,000-file scan limit.
Back to runway
Open runway
Import GPX
Checking the shared file…
Connect this Android app from runway before sharing a GPX.
Open runway and connect to your server before sharing a GPX.
The runway server changed before this GPX was sent. Share it again after reconnecting the Android app.
GPX added to the runway activity inbox.
This GPX is already in runway.
runway did not import this file. Open Import in runway, then upload it manually to review the problem.
The GPX could not be sent right now. Try sharing it again.
This share is not a readable GPX file.
This file is larger than the 10 MB import limit.
Close
